decisions.description: Verify if there is a Manager.ManagerId for the Opp Owner
decisions.name: Check_2nd_Manager
decisions.label: Check 2nd Manager

decisions.description: Check that the Manager.Manager.ManagerId is populated in the Opp Owner
decisions.name: Check_3rd_Manager
decisions.label: Check 3rd Manager

decisions.description: Check if the User that started the Flow has a "Channel Manager" populated
decisions.name: Check_Channel_Manager
decisions.label: Check Channel Manager

decisions.name: Closed_Lost_Date_For_Marketing_Greenlight
decisions.label: Closed Lost Date For Marketing Greenlight

decisions.name: Is_it_a_Renewal_Closed_Lost
decisions.label: Is it a Renewal? - Closed Lost

decisions.name: Is_it_a_Renewal_Closed_Lost_Reseller
decisions.label: Is it a Renewal? - Closed Lost - Reseller

decisions.description: What is the new Opportunity Stage
decisions.name: Opportunity_Stage
decisions.label: Opportunity Stage

decisions.description: MIS-5477 - Added $5000 ARR Threshold for Upsell
decisions.name: Opportunity_Type_Reseller
decisions.label: Opportunity Type - Reseller

decisions.description: MIS-5477 - Added $5000 ARR Threshold for Upsell
decisions.name: Opportunity_Type_Reseller_0
decisions.label: Opportunity Type - Reseller

decisions.description: Check if the Opp Won is a Reseller Or not.
decisions.name: Reseller_or_Not
decisions.label: Reseller or Not?

decisions.description: Check if the Opp Won is a Reseller Or not.
decisions.name: Reseller_or_Not_Reseller
decisions.label: Reseller or Not? - Reseller

decisions.name: Resseler_Not_Alpha_ARR_Bigger_than_5000
decisions.label: Resseler Not Alpha - ARR Bigger than 5000?

Flow.description: MIS-8004 New field: Opp Subdivision -> add to email body MIS-7948 - Changed unqualified SA to be closed as Pending Action MIS-7911 - Updated SA to be closed as Completed on Closed Lost, Added bypassing the validation MIS-7609 Remove Product Sold ->closed_won_managers_and_or MIS-7374 - Changed status update for ASR Request MIS-6014 - Remove non-reseller, closed lost renewal alerts, combine Resellers alert MIS-6049 - Fix bug in Greenlight Logic MIS-5888 Discovery - New Field: Marketing Greenlight MIS-5704 - Update management alerts logic MIS-5797 - Opp division conditions MIS-5859 - Moved $5000 threshold to apply only for management emails MIS-5589 - Added $100K/$50K or Cycle > 1 Email to management MIS-5477 - Added $5000 ARR Threshold for Closed-Won Upsell MIS-4905 - update Reseller recipients MIS-3513 - update 'closed_won_for_managers_and_or' text MIS-3305 - Added separate alerts for Alpha reseller (3rd manager) Added "MRR" to the Body email templates MIS-2544 - Closed Lost Renewals should be the same as in Closed Won MIS-2447 - Add link to the account in the data.ai email alert Added Channel Manager logic for Closed Opps Emails - MIS-2196 Added the Sub Flow for auto Request - MIS-2157 *** Added Data.ai overlap decision to send Emails for Opps that the related Account is flagged as "Data.ai Overlap" - MIS - 2175 Added an initial decision for SE Request creation - MIS 2043

formulas.name: Cycle_Bigger_Than_2_Years
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS(UPPER(TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c})), "YEAR"), IF( VALUE(LEFT(TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c}), FIND(" ", TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c})) - 1)) >= 2, TRUE, /* Return TRUE if 2 years or more */ FALSE /* Treat "1 year" as false */ ), IF( CONTAINS(UPPER(TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c})), "MONTH"), IF( VALUE(LEFT(TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c}), FIND(" ", TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c})) - 1)) >= 24, TRUE, /* Return TRUE if 24 months or more */ FALSE /* Return FALSE for less than 24 months */ ), FALSE /* Handle other non-month/year values */ ) )

formulas.description: Check if "Channel Manager" is populated on the triggered Opp Owner or not.
formulas.name: For_Calc_Channel_Manager

formulas.description: In Closed Lost, Customer Growth alias should only get alerts for Renewals. So we make sure the email alias will be added only in Renewal Close Lost.
formulas.name: For_Calc_Customer_Growth_Closed_Lost

formulas.description: Check if the closed Lost Opp is a Renewal. If yes, add Lior's Email to the Col Var.
formulas.name: For_Calc_Lior_Dgani_Closed_Lost_Renewal

formulas.description: Check if the Manager is excluded from Email Alerts (Checkbox)
formulas.name: For_Calc_Manager_Lvl2

Flow.label: Opportunity Flow Stage Changed

recordLookups.description: Get Client Success Strategist Request RT
recordLookups.name: Get_CSS_Request_RT
recordLookups.label: Get CSS Request RT

recordUpdates.description: Pull related open CSA/CSS/SE Request (by RT) and cancel them. MIS - 2199.
recordUpdates.name: Update_related_CSA_CSS_SE_Requests
recordUpdates.label: Update related CSA/CSS/SE Requests
recordUpdates.filterLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7 OR 8) AND 9

recordUpdates.description: Pull related open CSA/CSS/SE Request (by RT) and cancel them. MIS - 2199.
recordUpdates.name: Update_related_Trial_Requests
recordUpdates.label: Update related Trial Requests

subflows.description: Trigger "Request Alert" Flow - Migrated from "Opportunity PB" Process Builder
subflows.name: Request_Alert_Flow
subflows.label: Request Alert Flow

textTemplates.name: closed_won_managers_and_or
textTemplates.text:
The Client:

Account name: {!$Record.Account.Name}

ARR: {!$Record.ARR__c}

Contact name: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Contact_Related_To__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Contact_Related_To__r.LastName}

Linkedin Profile: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Contact_Related_To__r.LinkedIn_Profile__c}

Contact department: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Contact_Related_To__r.Department__c}

Website: {!$Record.Account.Clean_Domain__c}

Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}

SW Industry: {!$Record.Account.SW_Industry__c}

Number of employees: {!$Record.Account.Employees_Min__c} - {!$Record.Account.Employees_Max__c}

Business unit: {!$Record.Account.Business_Unit__c}


Product and use case

Product tracking: {!$Record.Opportunity_Product_Tracking__c}

Cycle: {!$Record.Cycle__c}

Plan details: {!$Record.Plan_Details__c}

Primary use case: {!$Record.Primary_Use_Case__c}

Secondary use case: {!$Record.Secondary_Use_Case__c}

Close won reason: {!$Record.Closed_Won_Reason__c}

Closed won reason-more details: {!$Record.Closed_Won_Reason_More_Details__c}


Sales and Marketing

Opportunity Owner: {!$Record.Owner.FirstName} {!$Record.Owner.LastName}

Opportunity Owner Division: {!$Record.Opportunity_Division__c}

Opportunity Generator: {!$Record.Opportunity_generator__c}

Meeting Creator: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.CreatedBy.FirstName} {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.CreatedBy.LastName}

Opportunity Lead Source: {!$Record.LeadSource}

Create date: {!$Record.CreatedDate}

Age: {!$Record.Age__c}

Original Lead Source: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Lead_Source__c}

Form Location URL: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Contact_Related_To__r.First_Form_Location_URL__c}

 Link to Opportunity: {!opp_record_link}

textTemplates.name: Data_ai_Client_Body_Email
textTemplates.text:
Please note that the following account is a potential Data.ai overlap- you may not propose the data.ai product to this client since it's Data.ai client.

Furthermore, you will not be able to generate a proposal or contract with Data.ai add on for this client.

If needed, you can escalate to your manager with a reason why confirmation is required. 

If you do not intend to propose data.ai to this client, you may continue to work on the deal normally

Link to the Account

textTemplates.name: Data_ai_Gaming_Body_Email
textTemplates.text:
Please note that the following account is in the Gaming/ Gambling industry - you may not propose the data.ai product to this client.

Furthermore, you will not be able to generate a proposal or contract with the Data ai product for this client. 

If you do not intend to propose data.ai to this client, you may continue to work on the deal normally

If needed, you can escalate to your manager with a reason why confirmation is required.

Link to the Account

textTemplates.name: Data_ai_Investors_Body_Email
textTemplates.text:
Please note that the following account deals with buying stocks - you may not propose the data.ai product to this client.

Furthermore, you will not be able to generate a proposal or contract with the Data ai product for this client. 

If you do not intend to propose data.ai to this client, you may continue to work on the deal normally

If needed, you can escalate to your manager with a reason why confirmation is required.

Link to the Account

textTemplates.name: Lost_Opp_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Opportunity {!$Record.Name} has been flagged as {!$Record.StageName}.


Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}


Cycle Price ($): {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}


Cycle: {!$Record.Cycle__c}


ARR: {!$Record.ARR__c}


Type: {!$Record.Type}


Close Date: {!$Record.CloseDate}


Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}


Using a Competitor: {!$Record.Competition__c}


Competitor Product: {!$Record.Competitor_Product__c}


Deal lost to a Competitor (Y/N): {!$Record.Deal_Lost_To_a_Competitor__c}


Original renewal amount: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Amount__c}


Renewal Date: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Date__c}


Created date: {!$Record.CreatedDate}


Closed Reason Lost: {!$Record.First_Closed_Lost_Reason__c}


Second Closed Reason: {!$Record.Second_Closed_Lost_Reason__c}


Sub Division: {!$Record.Sub_Division__c}


Closed Lost Reason - More Details: {!$Record.Closed_Lost_Reason_More_details__c}


Link to Opportunity

textTemplates.name: New_Sale_Won_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Opportunity {!$Record.Name} has been flagged as won.


Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}


Cycle Price ($): {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}


Cycle Price (Local): {!$Record.Cycle_Price_Local__c}


Cycle: {!$Record.Cycle__c}


ARR: {!$Record.ARR__c}


MRR: {!$Record.MRR__c}


Type: {!$Record.Type}


Opportunity Source: {!$Record.Opportunity_generator__c}


Close Date: {!$Record.CloseDate}


Renewal Date: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Date__c}


Original Renewal Amount: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Amount__c}


Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}


Related Meeting Number: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__c}


Related Meeting Created By: {!$Record.Related_Meeting_Created_By__c}


Age: {!$Record.Age__c}


Opportunity Division: {!$Record.Opportunity_Division__c}


Opportunity Sub Division: {!$Record.Owner_Sub_Division__c}


SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c


Industry Subtype: {!$Record.Industry_Subtype__c}


Forecasting Division: {!$Record.Forecasting_Division__c}


Sub Division: {!$Record.Sub_Division__c}


Link to the Opportunity

textTemplates.name: one_time_product_email
textTemplates.text:
Hi Sops,

This Closed Won opportunity - [opp link] includes a one-time product.


Please make sure to review this opportunity accordingly:

What should be checked:

  1. First, verify the quote and the contract including a one-time product with a value higher than $0.
  2. Make sure there is a separate opp for the one-time product - if there isn't, create it manually and close win it under the rep's name. In case the One time products have been sold together with RR products, please ensure that sum of the opportunities, and cycle price, is equal to the amount of the contract. For example, if you have a contract of $40,000, on which $15,000 are One-time product (needs to be in a separate opp as a cycle: one-time) + $25,000 as ARR (that will be into a separate opp under a cycle: annually, 2 years, etc)
  3. Check what is the price of the one-time product - because it should be reduced from the ARR of the first opp, then we should insert it as the cycle price of the one-time opp, while making sure the Cycle is defined as One-time.

How to understand what is the price of the one-time product:

  • Check the "Subscription Product & Charges" layout.
  • Check for a related billing ticket
  • Ask the rep for the price

textTemplates.name: Renewal_Won_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Opportunity {!$Record.Name} has been flagged as won.


Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}


Cycle Price ($): {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}


Cycle Price (Local): {!$Record.Cycle_Price_Local__c}


Cycle: {!$Record.Cycle__c}


ARR: {!$Record.ARR__c}


MRR: {!$Record.MRR__c}


Type: {!$Record.Type}


Opportunity Source: {!$Record.Opportunity_generator__c}


Close Date: {!$Record.CloseDate}


Renewal Date: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Date__c}


Original Renewal Amount: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Amount__c}


Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}


Related Meeting Number: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__c}


Related Meeting Created By: {!$Record.Related_Meeting_Created_By__c}


Age: {!$Record.Age__c}


Opportunity Division: {!$Record.Opportunity_Division__c}


Opportunity Sub Division: {!$Record.Owner_Sub_Division__c}


SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c}


Industry Subtype: {!$Record.Industry_Subtype__c}


Forecasting Division: {!$Record.Forecasting_Division__c}


Sub Division: {!$Record.Sub_Division__c}


Link to the Opportunity

textTemplates.name: Upsell_Won_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Opportunity {!$Record.Name} has been flagged as won.


Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}


Cycle Price ($): {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}


Cycle Price (Local): {!$Record.Cycle_Price_Local__c}


Cycle: {!$Record.Cycle__c}


ARR: {!$Record.ARR__c}


MRR: {!$Record.MRR__c}


Type: {!$Record.Type}


Opportunity Source: {!$Record.Opportunity_generator__c}


Close Date: {!$Record.CloseDate}


Renewal Date: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Date__c}


Original Renewal Amount: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Amount__c}


Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}


Related Meeting Number: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__c}


Related Meeting Created By: {!$Record.Related_Meeting_Created_By__c}


Age: {!$Record.Age__c}


Opportunity Division: {!$Record.Opportunity_Division__c}


Opportunity Sub Division: {!$Record.Owner_Sub_Division__c}


SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c}


Industry Subtype: {!$Record.Industry_Subtype__c}


Forecasting Division: {!$Record.Forecasting_Division__c}


Sub Division: {!$Record.Sub_Division__c}


Link to the Opportunity

variables.description: Specific Email collection for Data.ai Email Alerts
variables.name: Manager_Email_Collection_Data_ai
